---
title: "Coral Demography Data Cleaning"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(janitor)

wide_data_2013_2023 <- read_excel("~/MEDS/capstone/eds-coral-data-storage-management/data/data_raw_2024_sheets/Coral_Deomography_allyears_2013-24_V1.xlsx", sheet = 1)

individual_files <- list.files("rawdata/2024sheets", pattern = "*.xlsx", full.names = TRUE)

read_file <- function(f) {
  meta <- read_excel(f, col_names = FALSE, n_max = 1)
  obs <- tail(na.omit(as.character(meta[1, ])), 1)
  read_excel(f, skip = 1, col_names = TRUE, col_types = "text") %>%
    mutate(Observer = obs)
}

df <- bind_rows(lapply(individual_files, read_file)) %>%
    select(-any_of(c("W", "H", "L", "Status"))) %>%
    rename(any_of(c(habitat = "Hab", transect = "Tran"))) %>%
    mutate(
        l = coalesce(if("L2024" %in% names(.)) L2024 else NA_character_,
                     if("L24" %in% names(.)) L24 else NA_character_),
        w = coalesce(if("W2024" %in% names(.)) W2024 else NA_character_,
                     if("W24" %in% names(.)) W24 else NA_character_),
        h = coalesce(if("H2024" %in% names(.)) H2024 else NA_character_,
                     if("H24" %in% names(.)) H24 else NA_character_),
        dynamics = coalesce(if("Dynam" %in% names(.)) Dynam else NA_character_,
                            if("Dynamic" %in% names(.)) Dynamic else NA_character_,
                            if("Dyn" %in% names(.)) Dyn else NA_character_,
                            if("Dynamics" %in% names(.)) Dynamics else NA_character_),
        across(any_of(c("X", "Y", "Z", "l", "w", "h")), as.numeric)
    ) %>%
    select(-any_of(c("L2024", "W2024", "H2024", "L24", "W24", "H24",
                     "Dynam", "Dynamic", "Dyn", "Dynamics", "...17",
                     "status", "source_file"))) %>%
    mutate(year = 2024) %>%
    clean_names()
```

```{r}
wide_data_2013_2023 %>% 
  pivot_longer(c("W2013", "W2014"), names_to = "Year", values_to = c("w"))
```

```{r}
long_data <- wide_data_2013_2023 %>%
  select(!contains("24")) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(1:8), names_to = c(".value", "year"), names_pattern = "(.*)(\\d{4}$)") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(year))
```

```{r}
long_data_t <- long_data %>% 
  filter(str_detect(transect, "T"))
```

```{r}
pivot_test2 <- long_data_t %>% 
  separate_rows(dynamics_, sep = ", ") %>%
  mutate(present = case_when(
    is.na(dynamics_) ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ 1),
    dynamics_ = case_when(
                str_detect(dynamics_, "Fus") ~ "Fusion",
                str_detect(dynamics_, "Fis") ~ "Fission",
                TRUE ~ dynamics_
                              
      
    )) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = dynamics_, values_from = present, names_prefix = "dyn_", values_fill = 0) %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  select(-c(dyn_na, dyn_missing_data, dyn_edge))
```

```{r}
recruit_test <- pivot_test2 %>% 
  group_by(coral_number) %>% 
  summarize(recruit = sum(dyn_recruitment),
            death = sum(dyn_death))
```

```{r}
recruit_fix <- pivot_test2 %>% 
  arrange(coral_number, year) %>% 
  group_by(coral_number) %>% 
  mutate(dyn_recruitment = if_else(cumsum(dyn_recruitment) > 1, 0, dyn_recruitment), 
         year = as.numeric(year))
```

```{r}
death_test <- recruit_fix %>% 
  group_by(coral_number) %>% 
  mutate(death = sum(dyn_death)) %>% 
  filter(death > 1) %>% 
  select(coral_number, year, l, w, h, dyn_death)


```

```{r}

coral_test <- recruit_fix %>%
  mutate(recruit_year = case_when(
    dyn_recruitment == 1 ~ year,
    TRUE ~ NA),
     transect = case_when(coral_number %in% c(1347: 1353) ~ "T01",
                          coral_number %in% c(1361: 1363) ~ "T01", 
                          coral_number %in% c(1366: 1376) ~ "T01", 
                          coral_number %in% c(1466: 1483) ~ "T01",
                          coral_number == 1863 ~ "T04",
                          coral_number == 1872 ~ "T04", 
                          TRUE ~ transect)
  ) %>% 
  group_by(coral_number) %>% 
  mutate(recruit_year = sum(recruit_year, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  mutate(recruit_year = case_when(
    recruit_year == 0 ~ 2013,
    TRUE ~ recruit_year
  ),
  coral_id = str_c(site, habitat, transect, x, y, z, recruit_year, sep = "_"), 
  transect_id = str_c(site, habitat, transect, sep = "_"))


coral_test %>% 
  filter(coral_number == 1247)
 
```
